translation.en: I like studying in the new class.

exampleSentences: Sáng nay anh quên mang sách đến lớp nên phải mượn bạn.
Chị thích nhất môn toán trong lớp vì thầy dạy rất dễ hiểu.
Em có nhiều bạn mới khi bắt đầu vào lớp mới năm nay.
notes:
lớp usually means a class in school — a group of students learning together or a specific lesson period.  

It’s a countable noun: một lớp, hai lớp; you can also say lớp học to be more specific (“school class”).  

Very commonly, lớp also means a layer of something (like a layer of clothes, paint, dust, cream). Think of it as “one layer on top of another.”  

It can also refer to a grade level (like lớp 1, lớp 12).  

Memory tip: one word = either a group of students or a layer stacked on something.
notes_md:
**lớp** usually means a *class* in school — a group of students learning together or a specific lesson period.  

It’s a countable noun: *một lớp, hai lớp*; you can also say *lớp học* to be more specific (“school class”).  

Very commonly, **lớp** also means a *layer* of something (like a layer of clothes, paint, dust, cream). Think of it as “one layer on top of another.”  

It can also refer to a *grade level* (like lớp 1, lớp 12).  

Memory tip: one word = either a group of students or a layer stacked on something.
exampleSentencesTranslated: This morning I forgot to bring my book to class so I had to borrow one from a friend.
She likes math class the most because the teacher teaches very clearly.
I have many new friends when I start a new class this year.

translation.en: I am studying in this class.

definitions.en: A group of students who are taught together.
definitions.es: Un grupo de estudiantes que son enseñados juntos.
definitions.vi: Một nhóm học sinh được dạy cùng nhau.

example.en: I am studying in this class.
example.vi: Tôi đang học trong lớp này.
